description: Matthew Siegel from Vaneck discusses the rapid growth of DFDV DeFi Development, which rose from $0.70 to $42 in six weeks, with Parker White sharing insights on their capital formation and the valuation of crypto assets.
topic_summary: The session covers the evolution of DFDV DeFi Development, its funding journey, and the valuation dynamics of crypto balance sheet companies, emphasizing the importance of future growth expectations in asset pricing [t=54.19].
